templates.body:
CHANGE ORDER [co_id] · job [job_id]

Original: [quoted scope]
Now requested: [new scope]

Added cost: $[delta]
Time impact: [days]

Reply ACCEPT CO to proceed. Work paused until then.

One courtesy tweak included: [item].
If more changes, they will be quoted as CO.
We can add [item] as phase 2 after delivery. CO attached for optional schedule.
We cannot add [item] on this timeline/margin. Options: [alt].
CO [co_id] accepted. New ship target: [date]. Invoice delta: $[delta].
Quote [ref] covered [list]. [new ask] is outside scope. CO required.
STOP work on [component] until CO signed. Job [id].
